case_title: STUERMER, MARCIA DBA FOSSIL FAUX STUDIOS VS BARTZ, TROY DBA PARADISE LOUNGE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STUERMER, MARCIA DBA FOSSIL FAUX STUDIOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARTZ, TROY DBA PARADISE LOUNGE KINETIC ENTERTAINMENT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARTZ, TROY DBA PARADISE LOUNGE
PLFT'S REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT: REQUEST GRANTED BY COMM. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. DEFT. KINETIC ENTERTAINMENT INC DISM WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STUERMER, MARCIA DBA FOSSIL FAUX STUDIOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARTZ, TROY DBA PARADISE LOUNGE KINETIC ENTERTAINMENT, INC. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT: REQUEST GRANTED BY COMMISSIONER LYONS. DEFENDANT KINETIC ENTERTAINMENT, INC IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,473.33 FILED BY STUERMER, MARCIA DBA FOSSIL FAUX STUDIOS AS TO DEFENDANT BARTZ, TROY DBA PARADISE LOUNGE KINETIC ENTERTAINMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT. SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
